title: Silverjobs Portal
text:
Silverjobs Portal - SupportGoWhere
Silverjobs Portal
Share link
A job portal for seniors to explore work in various sectors for meaningful retirement.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Help seniors explore job opportunities
Collapse all sections
About this support

A job platform created by the Centre For Seniors (CFS) - a non-profit, Social Service Agency (SSA) - with seniors in mind to help them to explore work in various sectors for meaningful retirement.

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents aged 50 and above.
Please refer to each job position for requirements.

How to apply?

Please refer to each job position for application process.

Where can I find help?

View more details

Silverjobs Portal hotline: 6478 5015

Submit an enquiry

9 Bishan Place, Junction 8 Office Tower

#10-02, Singapore 579837

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
